name: First Prize Egg-Yolk Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar until fluffy.
2. Add the beaten egg yolks to which the flavorings have been added.
3. Combine the flour, baking soda, and cream of tartar, then add to the mixture.
4. Roll into small balls.
5. Dip into sugar, and flatten out on a greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 8 to 10 minutes.
7. Makes about 5 dozen cookies.
